## Title: Replace magic number with symbolic constant for LTE channel estimation symbols

### Summary
Replace the hardcoded magic number `3` (representing the number of OFDM symbols used for LTE channel estimation) with a descriptive symbolic constant `LTE_NUM_ESTIMATION_SYMBOLS` across the UE measurements module. This magic number appeared in multiple loop bounds throughout the codebase, making the intent unclear and creating maintenance risk if this value ever needs to change. Using a named co
